# Events

### May. 23 - May. 25, 2017

## CEBIT

**International Convention Centre**

 Darling Harbour 

 Sydney, New South Wales 2000 

 Australia

#### Description

#### [View this event's webpage »](http://www.cebit.com.au/)

#### Date and Time

Tue, May. 23

 - 
Thu, May. 25, 2017

#### Location

**International Convention Centre**

Darling Harbour

 Sydney, New South Wales 2000

 Australia

[](https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?app_id=&u=https://www.itpa.org.au/events/79/)[](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https://www.itpa.org.au/events/79/&text=&via=)[](https://www.itpa.org.au/events/79/)[](https://www.itpa.org.au/events/79/)[](mailto:?subject=&body=Good%20day!%20Check%20out%20our%20event:%20https://www.itpa.org.au/events/79/)[](https://www.itpa.org.au/events/print-view/79/)

### **International Convention Centre**

#### Darling Harbour

 Sydney, New South Wales 2000

 Australia
